core_equations.name: The Scalar Ground State
core_equations.summary: Space is not empty — every point holds a phase value. No particles, only varying phase.

core_equations.name: The Arc Vector
core_equations.summary: Motion is the direction phase changes most rapidly. The 'verb' of physics.

core_equations.name: Fundamental Wave Equation
core_equations.summary: Phase arcs propagate at the speed of light. The universe is a wave-medium.

core_equations.name: Harmonic Scaling (Fibonacci Metric)
core_equations.eq: ds² = g_μν dx^μ dx^ν, where √g ∝ φⁿ
core_equations.summary: Gravity is the field pooling into Fibonacci-harmonic nodes. Mass is an effect of this pooling.

core_equations.name: The Observer Transformation
core_equations.summary: Reality = absolute field minus observer's own phase-offset. This is why time is relative.

core_equations.name: Geodesic Curvature

core_equations.name: The Möbius Identity
core_equations.summary: Matter forms when a phase arc closes into a Möbius loop — a standing wave that cannot decay.

core_equations.name: Fibridge Compression Limit (DFA)

core_equations.name: Phase Propagation Topology (PPT)
core_equations.summary: Möbius singularity resolution mapping Navier-Stokes turbulence to a geometric speed-of-light bound.
